visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top and a silver necklace, holds a white cardboard bakery box filled with pastries. She smiles and gestures toward the box while shoppers move in the distant background. (2) The camera zooms in for a close-up of the pastries inside the box, which are large, golden-brown cheese butterfly crisps with visible baked cheese textures. The woman's hands hold the box steady against the backdrop of industrial warehouse shelving. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting with soft, warm lighting. Two women sit behind a marble table; the woman on the left holds an individual pastry while the woman on the right, wearing a blue beret and white dress, looks on. (4) The woman on the left breaks a piece of the pastry, showing its flaky internal layers to the camera. They both display expressive facial reactions, nodding and talking enthusiastically about the food item. (5) In a final sequence, the two women continue their dialogue, gesturing toward the open box on the table. The background includes a shelf with plush toys and household items, maintaining a casual vlog atmosphere.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 搶到最後一盒!. [Slogan]: 起司蝴蝶酥. [Subtitle]: 最後一盒哦. (2) [Subtitle]: 它這個起司看起來超美的哎. (3) [Subtitle]: 它裡面總共有6個. (4) [Subtitle]: 每一個都好大哦. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後這個蝴蝶酥6個是399元. (6) [Subtitle]: 看起來就很好吃. (7) [Subtitle]: 而且奶油剩那麼多. (8) [Subtitle]: 然後起司剩一個. (9) [Subtitle]: 對啊 超搶手哎. (10) [Subtitle]: 我們回來去試試看有沒有厲害. (11) [Slogan]: 起司蝴蝶酥. [Variety]: 一個66.5. [Subtitle]: 起司蝴蝶酥 一個66.5 一盒有六個. (12) [Subtitle]: 它的外皮呢拿去烤過加熱之後呢. (13) [Variety]: 非常地的酥脆. [Subtitle]: 會變得分常地的酥脆. (14) [Subtitle]: 然後裡面呢是非常那種蓬鬆. (15) [Subtitle]: 也像可頌那種蜂巢的口感. (16) [Subtitle]: 咬下去呢外皮酥酥脆脆. (17) [Subtitle]: 裡面呢柔軟QQ的. (18) [Variety]: 起司的陣陣香氣. [Subtitle]: 然後有起司的陣陣香氣. (19) [Subtitle]: 感覺它加了蠻多起司在它的麵團裡面. (20) [Subtitle]: 所以它烤起來的時候呢會非常的香. (21) [Subtitle]: 如果喜歡吃蝴蝶酥的人可以去試試看哦. (22) [Subtitle]: 加麵包一定很好吃. (23) [Subtitle]: 加麵包?. (24) [Subtitle]: 加麵包. (25) [Subtitle]: 加..加濃湯一定很好喝. (26) [Subtitle]: 像是酥皮濃湯一樣.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, at least 2 blurry passers-by in the warehouse scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The first main character has long black hair and wears a black cutout top. The second main character wears a dark beret and a white lace dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is a Costco warehouse with tall metal shelves, industrial lighting, and price tags. The second half is a domestic indoor setting with a marble table and a shelf of plushies.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with high arousal and a bright pitch, exclaiming about a 'last box' while upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music plays in the background with a steady 4/4 beat. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect coincides with a visual text overlay as the speaker shifts to a descriptive, moderate-speed narrative tone. The BGM remains consistent in volume and energy. (3) A soft 'pop' sound effect occurs as the scene transitions to two female voices interacting; their tones are friendly and conversational with rising intonations indicating excitement. (4) A percussive 'whoosh' sound accompanies a camera zoom, followed by clear vocal articulation of food textures. The music continues its repetitive synth loop without significant harmonic tension. (5) The female speakers exhibit a comedic tone shift with slight hesitation 'ja...ja', followed by laughter and light-hearted banter, while the BGM maintains its energetic profile until the video ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Detailed Review -> Humorous Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional food review for Costco's cheese butterfly crisps, aiming to entice viewers with the product's scarcity ('last box'), value for money, and sensory appeal (crispy texture and cheese aroma).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed pricing, brand exposure (Costco), and enthusiastic recommendation of a specific product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy short-form social media edit with significant text density and synchronized sound effects to maintain viewer engagement.
